name: proc_creation_win_msiexec_execute_dll
raw_query: any where (process.executable:"*\\msiexec.exe" and process.command_line like~ ("* -y*", "* /y*", "* –y*", "* —y*", "* ―y*")) and (not (process.command_line like~ ("*\\MsiExec.exe\" /Y \"C:\\Program Files\\Bonjour\\mdnsNSP.dll*", "*\\MsiExec.exe\" /Y \"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Bonjour\\mdnsNSP.dll*", "*\\MsiExec.exe\" /Y \"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Apple Software Update\\ScriptingObjectModel.dll*", "*\\MsiExec.exe\" /Y \"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Apple Software Update\\SoftwareUpdateAdmin.dll*", "*\\MsiExec.exe\" /Y \"C:\\Windows\\CCM\\*", "*\\MsiExec.exe\" /Y C:\\Windows\\CCM\\*", "*\\MsiExec.exe\" -Y \"C:\\Program Files\\Bonjour\\mdnsNSP.dll*", "*\\MsiExec.exe\" -Y \"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Bonjour\\mdnsNSP.dll*", "*\\MsiExec.exe\" -Y \"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Apple Software Update\\ScriptingObjectModel.dll*", "*\\MsiExec.exe\" -Y \"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Apple Software Update\\SoftwareUpdateAdmin.dll*", "*\\MsiExec.exe\" -Y \"C:\\Windows\\CCM\\*", "*\\MsiExec.exe\" -Y C:\\Windows\\CCM\\*")))
